ACS.name: Australian Computer Society
ACS.description: Assesses ICT professionals for skilled migration visa applications.

Engineers Australia.name: Engineers Australia
Engineers Australia.description: Assesses engineering qualifications and experience for migration purposes.

ANMAC.name: Australian Nursing and Midwifery Accreditation Council
ANMAC.description: Assesses nursing and midwifery qualifications for Australian migration.

VETASSESS.name: VETASSESS
VETASSESS.description: Assesses a broad range of professional and trade occupations for skilled migration.

TRA.name: Trades Recognition Australia
TRA.description: Assesses trade and technical occupations including automotive, fabrication, construction and electrical trades.

CPAA.name: CPA Australia
CPAA.description: Assesses accounting and finance professionals for Australian skilled migration.

ICAA.name: Chartered Accountants Australia and New Zealand
ICAA.description: Assesses chartered accountants and auditors for migration purposes.

IPA.name: Institute of Public Accountants
IPA.description: Assesses public accountants for Australian skilled migration.

AHPRA.name: Australian Health Practitioner Regulation Agency
AHPRA.description: Regulates health practitioners including doctors, dentists, pharmacists, physiotherapists, and psychologists.

ACWA.name: Australian Community Workers Association
ACWA.description: Assesses community and social workers for Australian migration.

AIPT.name: Australian Institute of Personal Trainers
AIPT.description: Assesses fitness, personal training and sports occupations.

TEQSA.name: TEQSA / AITSL
TEQSA.description: Assesses teachers and early childhood educators for Australian migration.

AACA.name: Architects Accreditation Council of Australia
AACA.description: Assesses architects for Australian skilled migration.

AIQS.name: Australian Institute of Quantity Surveyors
AIQS.description: Assesses quantity surveyors and cost engineers for Australian migration.

AIMS.name: Australian Institute of Management
AIMS.description: Assesses management professionals for Australian skilled migration.

SpeechPathAus.name: Speech Pathology Australia
SpeechPathAus.description: Assesses speech pathologists for Australian migration.

OT Australia.name: Occupational Therapy Australia
OT Australia.description: Assesses occupational therapists for Australian skilled migration.

AVBC.name: Australasian Veterinary Boards Council
AVBC.description: Assesses veterinary surgeons for Australian migration.

AAA.name: Agricultural Scientists / VETASSESS
AAA.description: Agricultural scientists and consultants are assessed by VETASSESS.

LIV.name: Law Institute of Victoria / State Law Society
LIV.description: Assesses solicitors and legal practitioners for Australian migration.
